content_body:
With over a mile of cable racing through the breathtaking views of the Cherokee Forest & Blue Ridge Mountains, Raft One has an adventure that you and your family will never forget!  It's an activity for the whole family, even the grandparents!

Have you never been on a zip line or canopy tour before?  No problem; these guides will be with you the whole way through the zip line canopy tour to make sure that you have a wonderful time!  Located in the heart of the Blue Ridge Mountains, just 15 miles from Blue Ridge, Georgia, Ocoee River Ziplines is a great afternoon activity.
title: Ocoee River Ziplines
